name: security-garage-door-wont-open
description: My garage door won't open. Pressed the remote and nothing happens. The light on the remote blinks.

hypotheses.label: Broken torsion spring
evidence_for: Remote sends signal — light blinks — but door doesn't move

hypotheses.label: Dead motor board
evidence_for: No movement despite remote signal suggests motor or board failure
evidence_against: Spring failure is more common than PCB failure

hypotheses.label: Safety beam blocked or misaligned
evidence_for: Motor may be halting due to safety cutout
evidence_against: Safety beam usually prevents closing not opening

mockAgentOutput.what_we_dont_know: We cannot tell whether the door makes any sound or movement at all when the remote is pressed.
mockAgentOutput.why_it_matters: Any sound or slight movement from the motor rules out a hard power or board failure and points toward a mechanical obstruction like a spring.

chips.text: The door makes a sound but doesn't move.
Complete silence — no sound at all.
The door moves slightly then stops.

expected.must_ask_about: whether the door makes any sound or movement
